expectations.text: The log-session-summary skill is invoked during this run
expectations.evidence: Transcript section 'Skill tool calls' reads 'NONE — no skill loaded; slash command not recognized'. Claude's response confirms the slash command /project-continuity:log-session-summary was unrecognized and no skill was invoked.

expectations.text: SESSION_LOG.md exists at the working directory root after the run
expectations.evidence: Directory listing of outputs/ contains only 'metrics.json' and 'transcript.md'. No SESSION_LOG.md was created. Transcript section 'Files created' also reads 'NONE'.

expectations.text: SESSION_LOG.md contains all five required sections (Date/time, Tasks completed, Files modified, Decisions made, Open questions) -- empty sections may be marked 'None' but must be present
expectations.evidence: SESSION_LOG.md does not exist (see assertion 2), so it cannot contain any required sections.
